examples: He stuck his nose out of the doghouse and saw four slender, hairy animals.
Poor Pinocchio huddled close to the doghouse more dead than alive from cold, hunger, and fright.
The toughest item was an enormous doghouse that didn't fit in the wrapping machine.
The struggling and controversy-wracked Hewlett-Packard (HPQ) may get out of the doghouse sooner than expected.
